notes: First Panini FIFA World Cup album. Brazil won their third title, earning the Jules Rimet Trophy permanently.
West Germany defeated the Netherlands 2-1 in the final. The new FIFA World Cup Trophy was introduced.
Argentina's first World Cup title. Mario Kempes top-scored with 6 goals. The Tango ball debuted.
Italy's third World Cup win. Paolo Rossi scored 6 goals to claim the Golden Boot. 24 teams competed for the first time.
Diego Maradona's tournament. The 'Hand of God' and the 'Goal of the Century' both came in the quarterfinal vs England.
The lowest-scoring World Cup ever. West Germany won with a penalty in the final against Argentina.
Brazil's fourth title, won on penalties against Italy — the first World Cup final to be decided on penalties.
France's first World Cup title. Zinedine Zidane scored twice in the final. First tournament with 32 teams.
First World Cup held in Asia. Brazil won their fifth title. Ronaldo scored 8 goals including 2 in the final.
Italy won on penalties against France. The final is remembered for Zidane's headbutt on Marco Materazzi.
First World Cup held in Africa. Spain's first title, won via Iniesta's extra-time goal against the Netherlands.
Germany defeated host Brazil 7-1 in the semi-final — the 'Mineirazo'. Mario Götze scored in extra time in the final.
France's second title. The tournament featured heavy use of VAR technology. Kylian Mbappé became the second teenager to score in a World Cup final.
First World Cup held in the Middle East. Argentina won their third title in a legendary final: 3-3 after extra time, 4-2 on penalties. Lionel Messi won the Golden Ball.
